sections.paragraph:
- Original: Μαγώγ

- Transliteration: Magog

- Phonetic: mag-ogue'

- Definition: Magog = "overtopping: covering"

1. a land north of Israel from which the King of Gog will come to attack Israel

- Origin: of hebrew origin H4031

- TDNT entry: 1:789,*

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H4031]; Magog a foreign nation that is (figuratively) an Antichristian party: - Magog.
